---
title: "Morphokinetic properties of mesenchymal stem cells as a predictor of differentiation potential"
author: "Y3948024"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:bh

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```
j
Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
